DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-19-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Kevin Lee, CSR Not On The Record , D501
Appearances:
No Appearances by either side

CROSS DEFENDANT PETR TITTELBACH'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT:

Sustained. Demurrer to the first cause of action for declaratory relief is sustained with leave to amend in good faith for cross-complainant to allege an actual controversy. If defendant is seeking the determination of his rights as to multiple issues/rights/obligations, each must be alleged in a separate cause of action. Demurrer to the second cause of action for indemnity is sustained without leave to amend.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).
